channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: David Campbell convicted of murdering former colleague Brian Low in Aberfeldy
item.description: A former head gamekeeper, David Campbell, 77, has been convicted of murdering his ex-colleague Brian Low, 65, on a secluded path in Aberfeldy, Highland Perthshire, in February 2024. Initially, Low's d...

item.title: OPPO's New Shenzhen Headquarters: A Glimpse into the Future of Tech Workspaces
item.description: Designed by Zaha Hadid Architects, the new OPPO headquarters in Shenzhen is a bold statement of futuristic design. The building, which began development in 2020, consists of four interconnected high-r...

item.title: UK Ministry of Defence reviews RAF records for flights linked to Jeffrey Epstein
item.description: The UK Ministry of Defence (MoD) has initiated a comprehensive review to determine whether the late convicted sex offender Jeffrey Epstein utilised Royal Air Force (RAF) bases during visits to the Uni...

item.title: Details of the villa where Jalisco cartel leader 'El Mencho' was killed
item.description: Nemesio Ruben Oseguera Cervantes, widely known as 'El Mencho', leader of the powerful Jalisco New Generation Cartel, spent his final hours in a luxury villa in the Tapalpa Country Club, Jalisco, befor...

item.title: A Comparison of IPL, Epilator, and Laser Hair Removal Methods
item.description: The article examines three popular hair removal methods: IPL (Intense Pulsed Light), epilators, and laser hair removal. It discusses how IPL devices work by emitting pulses of light to target hair fol...

item.title: BBC Reports from Culiacán Amid Surge of Cartel Violence Following Death of CJNG Leader
item.description: A surge of violence has swept across Mexico following the reported death of Nemesio Oseguera Cervantes, known as “El Mencho,” leader of the Jalisco New Generation Cartel (CJNG). After his capture duri...

item.title: Nvidia Reports Record Revenue Over $200 Billion for Fiscal 2026 Amid Strong AI Chip Demand
item.description: Nvidia, the world's most valuable company, released its fiscal 2026 financial results, showcasing exceptional performance that alleviated concerns about a potential AI investment bubble bursting. The ...

item.title: Six Cuban Exiles Held After Armed Speedboat Incident Amid US-Cuba Tensions
item.description: Six Cuban exiles were held under guard in hospital following an armed attempt to infiltrate Cuba by speedboat, in which four others were killed when Cuban forces returned fire. The suspects were repor...

item.title: Concerns raised over alleged ‘family voting’ at Gorton and Denton by-election
item.description: Concerns have been raised about alleged instances of illegal ‘family voting’ during the closely contested Gorton and Denton by-election. Democracy Volunteers, an organisation accredited by the Elector...

item.title: FBI Continues Review of Surveillance Footage in Search for Nancy Guthrie as Daughter Savannah Plans TV Return
item.description: The search for Nancy Guthrie, who has been missing from Tucson since February 1, is nearing its one-month mark, with no suspects identified. The FBI is currently reviewing up to 10,000 hours of video ...

item.title: Woman missing for 24 years located in North Carolina and arrested over outstanding DUI warrant
item.description: A woman who disappeared in December 2001 has been located in North Carolina after 24 years and arrested in connection with an outstanding drink-driving charge dating back to the time of her disappeara...

item.title: Instagram introduces alerts for parents when teens search for suicide or self-harm content
item.description: Instagram will begin alerting parents if their underage children repeatedly search for content related to suicide or self-harm. This change will affect users in the UK, US, Australia, and Canada who h...

item.title: Trump Offers No Clear Signal on Iran Strategy as Nuclear Talks Resume
item.description: US President Donald Trump declined to clarify his intentions toward Iran during his State of the Union address, despite heightened global tensions and an unprecedented American military build-up in th...

item.title: New DOJ Revelations Raise Questions About Epstein's Death and the Surveillance Footage

item.title: Review comparison: Sage The Soft Top Luxe Kettle (£119) versus Salter Alchemy Rapid Boil Kettle (£39.99)

item.title: Princess of Wales receives handmade necklace from young fans during community visits in Wales

item.title: Convicted Child Murderer Ian Huntley Seriously Injured in Prison Attack
item.description: Ian Huntley, the convicted child murderer responsible for the deaths of Holly Wells and Jessica Chapman in 2002, remains in a critical condition in hospital following a violent attack at HMP Frankland...

item.title: PAHO warns of rising Chikungunya cases across the Americas
item.description: The Pan American Health Organization (PAHO) has issued a warning about the resurgence of Chikungunya virus across the Americas. Health authorities have observed a notable increase in reported cases in...

item.title: UK Government Faces Uncertainty Over Environmental Impact of Data Centres
item.description: The UK Energy Secretary, Ed Miliband, has acknowledged that the effect of the rapid expansion of data centres on the nation's efforts to achieve net zero carbon emissions by 2050 is 'inherently uncert...

item.title: Spain Releases 1981 Coup Attempt Files to Address Longstanding Conspiracy Theories
item.description: Spain’s government has declassified 153 documents related to the failed coup attempt of 23 February 1981, a defining episode in the country’s transition from dictatorship to democracy. On that day, ar...
